_comment: AIOS Mastery is a high-touch programme. No Stripe checkout, no /courses/[slug] page — content is for /aios-program only.
title: AIOS Mastery
subtitle: The flagship programme — your business, run as an AI operating system.

hero.headline: Run your business with an AI operating system.
hero.subhead: Most people bolt AI onto existing workflows. AIOS teaches you to run your work through one. A complete, considered system across five layers — built inside your real business, not a sandbox.

whatIsAios: An AI operating system isn't software you install. It's the way you organise your business so AI is the default, not an add-on. Every recurring task has an owner — a workflow, an agent, or a person — and the system itself decides which. Your numbers are visible. Your decisions are surfaced. Your repetitive work runs on its own. The outputs that reach your customers are recognisably yours, but produced by a system you designed and maintain. AIOS Mastery teaches you to build this — across five layers, inside your actual business, with tools you'll keep using. No coding. Deep understanding required.

stack.heading: Five layers, built from the ground up.
stack.footer: Each layer earns its place by what it lets the layer above it do. You build them in sequence — that's why the programme works.

layers.name: Output layer
layers.tagline: the system produces what only you could design

layers.name: Automation layer
layers.tagline: the system handles the repetitive work

craftDifference.heading: Why AIOS Mastery doesn't look like other AI courses.

pairs.right: Layers built in your real workflow
A live AIOS you keep running
A system that compounds over years

curriculum.heading: Three phases. Seven modules. One live AIOS.
curriculum.footer: You finish with a complete, running AIOS — and the craft to keep evolving it.

modules.title: AI fluency for non-technical people
lessons: The evolution: tools → automations → agents → AIOS
What makes an AIOS different from a chatbot
Software composing — describing what you want vs coding it
modules.outcome: You can explain what an AIOS is, why it matters, and what distinguishes mastery from dabbling.

modules.title: Context layer — teaching the system your business
lessons: Building your business context document — the system's source of truth
What context AI actually needs (and what it doesn't)
Storing and retrieving context — Notion, Claude Projects, Google Drive
Keeping context current as the business changes
modules.outcome: Your AIOS has a single, curated source of truth about your business — the context every layer above will draw on.

modules.title: Data layer — connecting your business numbers
modules.outcome: Your AIOS can see your business — revenue, pipeline, customers, and key metrics, connected and readable.

modules.title: Intelligence layer — surfacing what matters
lessons: Building your "second brain" interface (Relevance AI / Claude Projects)
modules.outcome: A working intelligence layer: daily briefings, anomaly detection, and a queryable interface for your business knowledge.

modules.title: Automation layer — handling the repetitive work
lessons: Voice AI for intake and outreach
modules.outcome: At least 3 working automations running in your actual business — not demos, live systems.

modules.title: Output layer — building what matters
lessons: Software composing in practice (Claude Code + Lovable, no code)
modules.outcome: A personal AIOS dashboard and at least one custom internal tool — your AI outputs things only you could have designed.

modules.title: Integration and the craft of maintenance
lessons: What comes next — the frontier of AIOS (multi-agent, deeper memory, emerging tools)
modules.outcome: A complete, running AIOS across all 5 layers — and the confidence and knowledge to keep improving it independently.

tools.heading: What you actually use to build an AIOS.
tools.footer: AIOS isn't tied to any single vendor. These are the tools we teach with most often, because they actually work for non-technical operators in 2026.

forYou.title: This is for you if…
items: You run, lead, or own a business with real recurring work
You've outgrown one-off prompts and want a system
You can commit to building inside your real business, not a sandbox
You're comfortable not writing code, but willing to think hard
You've finished AI Fundamentals or Claude Code Mastery (or have equivalent fluency)

notForYou.title: This isn't for you if…
items: You're looking for a self-paced course you finish in a weekend
You want to learn to code (this isn't that programme)
Your business doesn't yet have recurring workflows worth automating
You're not ready for embedded weeks of building inside your real operations

valueLadder.heading: The catalogue, in order.
valueLadder.footer: AIOS Mastery isn't a substitute for the foundation courses — it builds on them. Most graduates have completed at least one of the three before applying.

pricing.heading: AIOS Mastery — full programme.
pricing.priceFootnote: Final investment confirmed on the discovery call. Payment plans available.
included: 1 live AIOS built inside your business
Working sessions on your real artefacts
Embedded weeks while the system takes hold
pricing.secondaryText: Or email enterprise@aicraftlearning.com directly — we reply within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Is this a self-paced course or a cohort programme?
faqs.answer: It's a guided programme. Delivery rhythm is set per buyer on the discovery call — some run in 8 weeks, some over a quarter, depending on how much your team can absorb at once.

faqs.question: Do I need to have completed the other AICraft courses first?
faqs.answer: Strongly recommended. AI Fundamentals or Claude Code Mastery (or equivalent fluency) gives you the vocabulary to move fast. We'll check fit on the discovery call.

faqs.question: How much time per week does it take?
faqs.answer: Most buyers spend 4–6 hours per week on AIOS — half learning, half building. The embedded weeks are heavier.

faqs.question: What does "embedded weeks" actually mean?
faqs.answer: Working sessions inside your real business: building automations on your real data, debugging in your real workflow, capstone presentation to your real team. Not demos.

faqs.question: What's the refund policy?
faqs.answer: 14 days, no questions asked. After that, we work with you to make it right rather than refund — this is a long programme and we want you to finish.

faqs.question: Are payment plans available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Three- and six-month plans are standard; longer terms case-by-case. Discussed on the discovery call.

faqs.question: What happens after the programme ends?
faqs.answer: Lifetime access to material updates, alumni network, and you keep your live AIOS. We also run quarterly alumni working sessions at no extra cost.

faqs.question: Will the certificate be recognised by employers?
faqs.answer: It's a verifiable record of demonstrated capability — buyers can verify it directly at your certificate URL. Recognition varies by employer; the artefact (your live AIOS) is the harder evidence.

faqs.question: How is AIOS Mastery different from AI Agents & Workflows?
faqs.answer: Agents & Workflows teaches you to build automations. AIOS teaches you to run your whole business through them. Different scope, different commitment, different artefact.

faqs.question: What if I'm not the right fit?
faqs.answer: The discovery call works both ways. If we don't think AIOS is right for your business yet, we'll say so — and often point you to a better starting point in the catalogue.
